programme.desc: Premier League Moments sits down with one of the most dominant centre-backs the league has ever seen. programme.title: PL STORIES

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Andoni Iraola went from relative obscurity to leading a once relegation-threatened club to its highest ever points tally in the Premier League. We explore how his fearless philosophy, tactical innovation and emotional connection to the game have driven his teams to challenge expectations and rewrite their identity. programme.title: NETBUSTERS

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Darren Bent is one of a select number of players to have scored a century of goals in the Premier League. The prolific striker recalls his days at Ipswich, Charlton, Spurs, Sunderland, and Aston Villa and the goals he scored on his way to joining that elite group.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We reflect on the rapid rise of Micky van de Ven, tracing his journey from a promising young defender in the Netherlands to becoming one of the Premier League's most electrifying modern centrebacks. We sit down with van de Ven to explore the resilience, mentality and sheer speed, on and off the pitch that have defined his ascent.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE DUTCH MASTERS
programme.desc: A high-energy hour showcasing legendary Dutch footballers, including Ruud Gullit, Edwin van der Sar, George Boateng, Mario Melchiot, Jaap Stam and more.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: When Arne Slot guided Liverpool to their 20th League title in his debut season, it marked the beginning of a new era, yet echoed a familiar tradition. Explore the rich legacy of Liverpool's managerial transitions, where through decades of change, one constant endures: the club's remarkable ability to evolve and triumph, through seamless succession.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: From the depths of League One to becoming a Premier League and European champion, Adam Lallana emerged as one of English football's standout talents of the 2010s. The midfielder recalls his most memorable matches for Southampton and Liverpool.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Maya Yoshida quietly became one of the Premier League's most dependable defenders during his years at Southampton, but his influence reached far beyond the pitch. In this episode, we look back at Yoshida's journey from Japan to England's top-flight, his role as a leader for club and country, and the cultural bridge he helped build along the way.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2015/2016 (LEI)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: After watching their already relegated side lose to the Invincibles on the last day of the 2003/4 Premier League season, some Leicester City fans stayed behind to watch Arsenal lift the trophy at Highbury. Those fans endured ten years in the wilderness, only for Leicester to return to the big time and embark on a rollercoaster couple of years.

programme.title: PL STORIES
